profile.name: Garv Anand
philosophy: I treat every ML model as a product — if it can't survive noisy inputs, edge cases, and production latency, it doesn't ship.
I believe the best AI systems are invisible to their users. ElderAI doesn't ask elderly people to learn technology; it meets them where they are — their voice.
I optimize for learning velocity over stack loyalty. PyTorch today, a new framework tomorrow — the fundamentals of linear algebra, probability, and systems thinking don't change.

experience.focus: Production PDF layout detection & document intelligence pipelines
experience.impact: Built end-to-end vision-parsing pipelines processing 40+ page PDFs with complex table layouts at production scale
details: Engineered YOLOv8-based table detection pipeline for structured data extraction from noisy, variable-layout PDFs
Integrated Microsoft Table Transformer for precise cell-level parsing of detected table regions
Built LlamaIndex RAG pipeline for semantic search over extracted document content
Handled real-world edge cases: rotated scans, multi-column layouts, nested tables, low-resolution inputs

experience.impact: 3 workshops delivered to 150+ students, 92% satisfaction rate

projects.title: ElderAI
projects.subtitle: Voice-First AI Companion for the Elderly
projects.problem_statement: Elderly people who cannot navigate smartphone interfaces are locked out of the benefits of AI assistants. Existing solutions assume screen literacy.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Designed and built the full inference pipeline: voice capture → Whisper STT → intent classification → RAG-powered memory retrieval → LLM response generation → TTS output. Implemented the real-time memory layer that remembers user context across sessions.
projects.description: A multimodal AI companion that uses voice as the primary interaction modality — no screens, no typing. Combines speech-to-text, intent parsing, contextual memory (RAG), and natural voice responses to serve users who can't use traditional apps.
projects.signal: I design AI systems around human limitations, not around what's technically convenient.
projects.impact_metric: End-to-end voice AI pipeline with persistent memory across sessions

architectureFlow.detail: Context retrieval from persistent user history

projects.title: Parkinson's Detection
projects.subtitle: Early Detection from Speech via Bi-LSTM
projects.problem_statement: Early-stage Parkinson's disease is difficult to detect clinically. Speech degradation is one of the earliest biomarkers but requires specialized analysis.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Built the Bi-LSTM model architecture from scratch, implemented GAN-based data augmentation to handle the small dataset (195 entries), and achieved 93% accuracy. Authored the research paper submitted to Elsevier.
projects.description: Engineered a Bi-LSTM model for early Parkinson's disease detection from speech patterns, with GAN-based augmentation to overcome limited training data.
projects.signal: I can take a research problem from architecture design to publication-ready results.
projects.impact_metric: 93% accuracy on benchmarked datasets — paper submitted to Elsevier AI in Medicine (Scopus, In Review)

projects.title: Multimodal Speech Emotion Recognition
projects.subtitle: Deep Learning for Virtual Classroom Engagement
projects.problem_statement: Virtual classrooms lack real-time feedback on student engagement. Instructors cannot gauge emotional state from a grid of muted video feeds.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Built the multimodal fusion layer combining acoustic (Bi-LSTM), visual (CNN), and linguistic (Transformer) feature streams. Trained on RAVDESS and CREMA-D datasets with custom preprocessing pipelines.
projects.description: A multimodal deep learning framework that fuses audio, video, and text signals to classify student emotional states in real-time during virtual lectures.
projects.signal: I can architect multi-stream deep learning systems that fuse heterogeneous data modalities.
projects.impact_metric: Three-stream fusion model (Bi-LSTM + CNN + Transformer) trained on RAVDESS & CREMA-D

projects.title: VITAL-AI
projects.subtitle: ML-Powered Health Risk Prediction
projects.problem_statement: Individuals lack proactive health risk assessment — they only visit doctors after symptoms appear. Early warning systems could trigger preventive action.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Built the Random Forest risk prediction engine and designed the Flask API layer. Integrated Google Fit data sync for continuous vitals monitoring. Built at HackByte 3.0 (IIITDM Jabalpur).
projects.description: A health monitoring platform combining wearable data sync with real-time disease risk prediction using Random Forest models and an intuitive dashboard.
projects.signal: I can build end-to-end ML products under hackathon pressure — from data pipeline to deployed UI.
projects.impact_metric: Real-time risk prediction from combined vitals data — built in 36 hours at HackByte 3.0

projects.title: DrowseGuard
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Driver Drowsiness Detection System
projects.problem_statement: Driver fatigue is a leading cause of highway accidents. Passive monitoring systems are often too slow or inaccurate for high-speed response.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Developed the real-time CV pipeline using MediaPipe for high-fidelity facial landmark tracking. Engineered a custom EAR (Eye Aspect Ratio) calculation logic that handles varying lighting conditions and eyewear, achieving sub-100ms inference latency.
projects.description: A safety-critical computer vision system that monitors driver fatigue in real-time, using EAR and MAR (Mouth Aspect Ratio) analysis to trigger instant alerts upon detection of microsleep or persistent yawning.
projects.signal: I build vision systems that operate with production-grade reliability in mission-critical environments.
projects.impact_metric: Sub-100ms inference latency on standard mobile hardware using optimized landmark pipelines

projects.title: KindKart
projects.subtitle: Donation-Centric Marketplace for Social Impact
projects.problem_statement: The bridge between excess household items and NGO requirements is broken. Donors lack visibility, and NGOs face massive logistical hurdles in item verification.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Architected the dual-app system (Donor & NGO portals). Implemented the points-based 'Karma Marketplace' gamification layer and the secure Firebase-driven item verification workflow. Optimized the Android UI for a premium, startup-grade experience.
projects.description: A production-grade philanthropic ecosystem that facilitates seamless item donations through a gamified marketplace, featuring real-time tracking, role-based access control, and advanced UI micro-interactions.
projects.signal: I can architect complex, multi-user platforms that balance social impact with premium user experience.
projects.impact_metric: Full-stack mobile ecosystem with localized NGO/Donor role-based workflows

projects.title: RL-Traffic-Lights
projects.subtitle: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Urban Flow
projects.problem_statement: Fixed-time traffic signals are inefficient in dynamic urban environments, causing unnecessary congestion and increased CO2 emissions.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Implemented Independent Multi-Agent RL agents using the PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization) algorithm. Built the simulation bridge between PyTorch and SUMO (TraCI) to enable real-time intersection control and state feedback.
projects.description: A sophisticated ML project that applies MARL to optimize traffic signal timings. Intersections act as autonomous agents that learn to minimize global waiting times through continuous simulation and reward shaping.
projects.signal: I apply state-of-the-art RL research to solve complex, real-world infrastructure optimization problems.
projects.impact_metric: Simulated waiting time reduction via PPO Actor-Critic optimization

projects.title: RCBS
projects.subtitle: Production-Grade Indian Banking Simulation
projects.problem_statement: Most banking simulations ignore the complexity of real-world constraints like RBI regulations, transaction idempotency, and multi-agent fraud monitoring.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Architected the core banking logic using SQL transactions for strict data integrity. Built the 'Agentic Core' featuring Fraud and Compliance agents that monitor UPI/NEFT flows in real-time. Localized the entire system for RBI standards.
projects.description: The Resident Banking India System (RBIS) is a high-fidelity simulation of an Indian banking backend, implementing KYC, idempotent UPI/IMPS transactions, and agent-driven regulatory oversight.
projects.signal: I build fintech systems that respect industrial-strength constraints: idempotency, atomicity, and regulatory compliance.
projects.impact_metric: Multi-agent architecture (Fraud, Compliance, Load) for regulatory simulation

projects.title: TrustIQ
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Multi-Standard Compliance Assessment
projects.problem_statement: Enterprise compliance across multiple ISO standards (27001, 37001, etc.) is a manual, error-prone process involving thousands of pages of policy documents.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Built the 7-agent AI pipeline that orchestrates gap analysis and evidence validation. Developed the 3-tier hybrid scoring engine that cascades from GenW.AI to local models, ensuring 100% uptime for assessments.
projects.description: Developed for Deloitte's Hacksplosion 2026, TrustIQ is an enterprise compliance intelligence platform that parses policies and validates readiness across 6+ ISO standards simultaneously using specialized AI agents.
projects.signal: I design enterprise-scale agentic workflows that transform massive unstructured data into actionable intelligence.
projects.impact_metric: 7-agent pipeline for ISO compliance automation — Deloitte Hacksplosion 2026 Submission

projects.title: YouTube Doubt Solver
projects.subtitle: Context-Aware Video Learning Companion
projects.problem_statement: Learners often get stuck on specific concepts in long technical tutorials but lack a way to get immediate, video-contextual clarification.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Engineered the RAG pipeline for video content. Built the logic to extract and index transcripts with temporal metadata, enabling time-stamped responses that point users to the exact moment a concept is explained.
projects.description: An AI assistant that provides real-time, video-specific Q&A for YouTube content, using contextual understanding to clarify difficult concepts without leaving the video scope.
projects.signal: I build intuitive AI tools that bridge the gap between static content and active learning.
projects.impact_metric: Video-contextual RAG with precise temporal referencing

projects.title: FoodMind
projects.subtitle: Production-Grade Nutrition Intelligence
projects.problem_statement: Most health apps offer generic advice. Production systems require high-fidelity data validation, accessible UIs, and hardened security to be viable.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Led the hardening for Cloud Run deployment. Achieved 100% compliance in accessibility (W3C ARIA) and security (CSP/DOMPurify). Integrated Firebase Analytics and automated test suites for continuous verification.
projects.description: A nutritionist-focused intelligence app hardened for enterprise deployment, featuring personalized diet planning, real-time nutrient tracking, and a 100% accessibility/security score.
projects.signal: I take ML prototypes and transform them into hardened, production-ready enterprise applications.
projects.impact_metric: 100% Compliance Score (Accessibility, Security, Testing) — Deployed on Google Cloud Run

projects.title: Interview AI-er
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Mock Interview Platform
projects.problem_statement: Job seekers lack a low-cost, high-fidelity way to practice interviews with realistic feedback and performance tracking.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Architected the full-stack system integrating Next.js with a Flask backend. Developed the AI evaluation pipeline using Gemini for real-time answer scoring and the proctoring logic that detects anomalies during sessions.
projects.description: An intelligent mock interview ecosystem that generates dynamic questions, evaluates responses with AI, and provides detailed performance metrics while monitoring session integrity.
projects.signal: I build full-stack AI platforms that bridge the gap between skill acquisition and professional assessment.
projects.impact_metric: End-to-end AI interview lifecycle with automated proctoring and feedback

projects.title: Rajasthan Club
projects.subtitle: Community Platform for Cultural Visibility
projects.problem_statement: Cultural organizations often lack a centralized digital presence to coordinate events and showcase their heritage to a broader audience.
projects.my_specific_contribution: Designed and developed the responsive web interface using React and Tailwind CSS. Implemented a dynamic event showcase and cultural archive to preserve and promote club activities.
projects.description: A community-focused web platform built to enhance the digital footprint of the Rajasthan Club, featuring event tracking, cultural storytelling, and a modern, responsive user interface.
projects.signal: I create accessible, community-driven web experiences that solve visibility problems for local organizations.
projects.impact_metric: Responsive community hub for cultural event management and heritage archiving
